agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: UX flow, copy consistency, states, navigation, and accessibility auditor for Penny dashboard
stop_conditions_hit: Copy issue count under 20; coverage_complete set true

coverage.notes: No apps/dashboard/app/loading.tsx; client-heavy pages use in-component loading (e.g. PageLoadingSkeleton, EngineView local state).

findings.title: RetryableError heading says portfolio on project detail load failure
findings.description: ProjectPageClient uses RetryableError with a project-specific hint, but the component hard-codes the H1 as Could not load portfolio, which mislabels the context when the user is on /projects/[name].

proof_hooks.value: /projects/<name> (after auth, when fetch fails with empty projects)

findings.title: No custom not-found page in app directory
findings.description: apps/dashboard has no not-found.tsx; unknown URLs fall back to the default Next.js 404 without Penny navigation or voice-aligned copy.

findings.title: No route-level loading.tsx for dashboard segments
findings.description: There is no loading.tsx under apps/dashboard/app; first navigation relies on client bundles and per-page skeletons. Adding segment loading UI could improve perceived performance and consistency across routes.

findings.title: Document product voice and tone for Penny UI
findings.description: UI_COPY centralizes many strings, but there is no single documented voice (e.g. formal vs conversational, when to use title case in section labels, monospace vs sans for body). A short voice doc would reduce drift as new surfaces ship.

findings.title: Project-not-found eyebrow uses lowercase project
findings.description: ProjectMissingState uses an uppercase-styled eyebrow with the literal project while other screens use labels like Portfolio or Engine (title-style). Align casing or use a shared pattern.

findings.title: Repairs engine initial load is plain loading text
findings.description: EngineView shows a minimal loading… span while other views use PageLoadingSkeleton or richer layout placeholders, causing inconsistent perceived polish on /repairs.

findings.title: Empty routing table message uses informal lowercase
findings.description: When routes are empty and there is no error, the UI shows no routing config found without sentence case or terminal punctuation, unlike surrounding copy.

findings.title: Segment error UI drops app chrome (sidebar)
findings.description: app/error.tsx renders a standalone layout without Shell, so recoverable errors in nested routes remove navigation until the user follows Portfolio. Consider nested error boundaries or wrapping error UI with shell for wayfinding.

next_actions: Parameterize RetryableError title (or add variant) so project fetch failures do not say portfolio.
Add apps/dashboard/app/not-found.tsx with Shell and return links to Portfolio, Repairs, and Activity.
Align EngineView loading state with PageLoadingSkeleton or a small engine-specific skeleton.
Optionally add nested error.tsx under route groups if preserving sidebar on errors becomes a priority.
